'''Shakker''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during a raid against [[XQ3 Platform|Outpost]] [[NL-1]]. The Rebel attack failed due to efforts by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces defending the station, thus forcing Rebel leaders to flee. Shuttle ''Shakker'' was disabled by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboat]] ''[[Tau]] 1'', and subsequently captured by [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Transport]] ''[[Soryi]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
